title: perinkara
intro: Perinkara, commonly known as Pericarpium Citri Reticulatae, is a plant-based medicine that is derived from the dried peels of the orange fruit. It is valued for its various health benefits, including its ability to aid in digestion, relieve nausea and vomiting, and alleviate colds and fever. The therapeutic actions of Perinkara include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe and calm the body. The bioactive constituents of Perinkara include limonene, beta-pinene, and gamma-terpinene, among others, which contribute to its therapeutic effects.
